expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜用的板材大小。[宽度]、[高度] 和 [深度] 是总测量值，[板材厚度] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[背景板厚度] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] are total measurements, [BoardThick] is the material thickness for the Top, Bottom, and Side Boards, and [BackBoardThick] is the material thickness for the Back Board.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan untuk Papan Atas, Bawah, dan Sisi, dan [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan untuk Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan material untuk Papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, sedangkan [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan material untuk Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดกระดานสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือน้ำหนักรวม [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุบอร์ดบนล่างและข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุบอร์ดด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước tấm ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là tổng kích thước, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của Tấm Trên, Dưới, và Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của Tấm Sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang sukat, [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal para sa Itaas, Ibaba, at Gilid na Board, at [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng Board sa Likod. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကဘေးနီယာနံရံများအတွက်ဘုတ်အရွယ်အစားကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width]၊ [Height]နှင့် [Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချုပ်စရာဖြစ်ပြီး [BoardThick] သည်ထိပ်၊ အောက်နှင့်ဘေးဘုတ်များအတွက်ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်ပြီး [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်တိုင်းဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်သည်။(AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាអំពីទំហំបន្ទះសម្រាប់ទូ។ [ទទឹង] [កម្ពស់] និង [ជម្រៅ] គឺជាទំហំសរុប [BoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សំភារៈសម្រាប់ផ្ទៃខាងលើ បាត និងផ្ទាំងចំហៀង និង [BackBoardThick] គឺជាកម្រាស់សំភារៈសម្រាប់ផ្ទាំងខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດຂອງບອດສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນຂະຫນາດລວມ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງວັດຖຸສໍາລັບບອດທາງເທິງ, ລູ້ນ, ແລະດ້ານຂ້າງ, ແລະ [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງບອດທາງຫລັງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネット用の板のサイズを計算します。[幅]、[高さ]、[奥行き] は全体の寸法を表し、[板の厚さ] は上部、下部、側板の材料厚さ、[背景板の厚さ] は背面板の材料厚さを表します。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛을 위한 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 전체 치수를 나타내며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드 재료 두께를 나타내고, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드 재료 두께를 나타냅니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material para las tablas superior, inferior y laterales, y [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material para la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau pour les planches supérieure, inférieure et latérales, et [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau pour la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialdicke für die oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platten, und [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialdicke für die Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप हैं, [BoardThick] ऊपर, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, और [BackBoardThick] बैक बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — это общие размеры, [BoardThick] — толщина материала для верхних, нижних и боковых досок, а [BackBoardThick] — толщина материала для задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
